hooks.command: sh -lc 'root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; script="$root/scripts/memforge_hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$script" ]; then echo "MemForge hook script not found" >&2; exit 0; fi; exec python3 "$script" context --client codex'

sh -lc 'root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; script="$root/scripts/memforge_hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$script" ]; then echo "MemForge hook script not found" >&2; exit 0; fi; exec python3 "$script" submit-session --client codex'

sh -lc 'root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; script="$root/scripts/memforge_hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$script" ]; then echo "MemForge hook script not found" >&2; exit 0; fi; exec python3 "$script" submit-session --client codex'
